messenger_inbox_subset.text: [action] {"negotiation_op": "session_request", "proposed_participants": ["Riley Carter", "Jordan Hayes", "Avery Singh"], "purpose": "Align on today's lunch batch supply and delivery window."}

said: "Jordan, Avery — I need today’s lunch batch locked in. Delivery: 10:45–11:15. Quantity target: ~60 meal portions’ worth of standard staples; must be fresh (morning batch). Please send all‑in quotes: unit price, total, ETA, any MOQ, and spoilage‑swap terms. COD preferred. I can split volume if that helps hit the window. Clock’s running — I’ll choose in about 10 minutes. Formal proposals welcome."

said: "Jordan, Avery — quick quotes please. Need 60 portions, drop 10:45–11:15. Morning batch only. Send unit price, total, ETA, any MOQ, and spoilage‑swap terms. COD preferred. I can split 40/20 if that locks the window. Confirm on‑time confidence and what happens if you slip past 11:15. I’ll choose in ~10 minutes."

said: "Jordan, Avery — quick check. I decide in five minutes. Need morning batch for 60, drop 10:45–11:15. Please post your all‑in: unit price, total, ETA, spoilage‑swap, and remedy if past 11:15. COD preferred. I can split 40/20 if that locks timing. What’s your on‑time confidence?"

said: "Jordan, Avery — last call. I lock in two minutes. Need 60 portions, drop 10:45–11:15, morning batch only. Send unit price, total, ETA, any MOQ, spoilage‑swap, and your late remedy (credit or %). COD. If both fit, I’ll split 40/20. What’s your on‑time confidence, and what happens if you slip past 11:15?"

said: "Jordan, Avery — here’s my anchor to move this: 60 portions, morning batch, drop 10:45–11:15. Price target $6.50 per portion all-in, COD on delivery. Late past 11:15 → 10% credit; past 11:30 I can cancel undelivered units. Spoilage swap 1:1 within 24h. If both can meet, I’ll split 40/20 based on tighter ETA. If your best is different, post unit price, total, and ETA now. I decide in 60 seconds."

said: "Jordan, Avery — I have to lock now. $6.50/portion COD, 60 portions, drop 10:45–11:15, morning batch. Late past 11:15 = 10% credit; past 11:30 I can cancel; 1:1 spoilage swap in 24h. I’ll split 40/20 by tighter ETA. First to confirm with a firm ETA inside the window gets the 40. Please confirm now."

Late past 11:15 → 10% credit. Past 11:30 → buyer may cancel undelivered units.", "compliance": "Morning batch freshness required. Spoilage swap 1:1 within 24 hours.", "penalty": "10% credit if

said: "Jordan, Avery — I’ve put a $390 COD proposal on the table for 60 portions, drop 10:45–11:15 with the late‑credit terms. Please accept or amend now and post a firm ETA. First firm ETA at or before 11:00 gets 40 portions; the other gets 20. If you can only do part or need a different unit price, state units, unit price, total, and ETA. Clock’s tight."

said: "Avery, I’ve accepted the $390 terms and Jordan’s already in. I need your accept and a firm ETA now. Window is 10:45–11:15. First firm ETA at or before 11:00 gets 40 portions; the other takes 20. If you’re only good for 20, say so now. Clock’s tight."

said: "Avery, I need your accept and a firm ETA now—45 seconds. Window is 10:45–11:15. If you’re only good for 20, say so. Jordan, confirm your firm ETA and whether you can cover the full 60 if Avery passes. Same $6.50 COD and late-credit terms. If I don’t have Avery’s accept in 45 seconds, I proceed with Jordan alone and re-issue on the same terms."

said: "Avery, last call—10 seconds. Accept the $390 terms and post a firm ETA inside 10:45–11:15. If no reply, I proceed with Jordan solo for all 60 at $6.50 COD, same late-credit and swap terms, and open a separate order. Jordan, confirm you can cover all 60 and give your firm ETA."

said: "Jordan, I’m proceeding solo. Can you cover all 60 at $6.50 COD with the same late‑credit and 1:1 swap terms? Give me a firm ETA inside 10:45–11:15—aim for 10:55–11:00. If yes, I’ll issue a bilateral contract and lock it. Avery, if you can’t meet the window, please pass and exit so I can finalize."

[action] {"negotiation_op": "session_request", "proposed_participants": ["Riley Carter", "Jordan Hayes"], "purpose": "Finalize bilateral order for today’s lunch batch—quantity, delivery window, COD, and swap terms."}

[action] {"negotiation_op": "formal", "verb": "propose_contract", "terms": {"price": 390.0, "regulatory_required": 0, "financing_required": 0, "valuation": "60 units at $6.50 each", "payment": "COD on delivery", "closing": "Deliver within 10:45–11:15; target 10:55–11:00", "compliance": "1:1 swap for quality defects at handoff", "penalty": "Arrival after 11:15 → $15 late credit"}}
said: "Jordan, contract’s signed. Target 10:55 inside the 10:45–11:15 window. Please text 10 minutes out. Keep greens cool, tomatoes on top. COD $390 ready."

[action] {"negotiation_op": "session_request", "proposed_participants": ["Riley Carter", "Jordan Hayes"], "purpose": "Bilateral to plan today’s lunch batch: quantity, delivery window, COD, and swap terms."}

[action] {"negotiation_op": "session_request", "proposed_participants": ["Riley Carter", "Jordan Hayes"], "purpose": "Bilateral to finalize today's lunch batch: quantity, delivery window, COD, and swap terms."}
said: "Jordan, I’m covered for lunch today. I’ll ping by 3 to lock tomorrow’s window and quantity. Thanks."

said: "Jordan, today’s drop went smooth. For tomorrow I’m penciling 4 trays greens + 2 trays tomatoes, window 10:45–11:15—target 10:55. Same COD and 1:1 swap terms. Can you confirm availability and quote? If steady, I’ll lock by 3."

said: "Jordan, tomorrow's 4 greens + 2 tomatoes is locked at $390 COD. Target 10:55 inside 10:45–11:15. Text me 10 minutes out. Same swap and late-credit terms. Any supply hiccups overnight? If not, main receiving door as usual."

[private to ['Jordan Hayes']]  said: "Jordan, we’re set for tomorrow: 4 greens + 2 tomatoes at $390 COD. Target 10:55 inside 10:45–11:15. Text me 10 min out. Please keep two extra greens on standby for 12:15; I’ll confirm by 11:30 if needed."
